# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report suspected security vulnerabilities privately by emailing
[shaanshoukath4522@gmail.com](mailto:shaanshoukath4522@gmail.com). Do not open a public GitHub issue
for a vulnerability.

Include the affected version or commit, steps to reproduce the issue, and its
potential impact. We will make a best-effort acknowledgement within a few days
and will coordinate remediation and disclosure with you.

## Supported versions

Security fixes land on the latest release and/or `main`. Support for older tags
is provided on a best-effort basis.
